docket_entries.description: REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 08/15/2025. SC-130 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF. (RETURN TO SENDER UNCLAIMED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,716.01 FILED BY LIBERT, SERGIY SHIN, HEATHER AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, RICHARD GABE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-07-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $100.00 SERVED JUN-26-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, RICHARD GABE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-07-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-07-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA, APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS SERGIY LIBERT AND HEATHER SHIN ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-07-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIBERT, SERGIY SHIN, HEATHER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ORTIZ, RICHARD GABE NO CAUSE OF ACTION - THE CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 08/15/2025. SC-130 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER UNCLAIMED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
